name: golang-github-mattn-go-isatty-dev
title: golang-github-mattn-go-isatty-dev
summary: Golang library to implementation isatty interface
description:
Golang library to implementation isatty interface
The isatty() function tests whether a file descriptor refers to a terminal.
.
This package provides a library to implement isatty interface to Golang
command-line programs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-mattn-go-isatty-dev because Golang library to implementation isatty interface.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-mattn-go-isatty-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-mattn-go-isatty-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-mattn-go-isatty-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
